pois.name: Petersburg Cruise Dock
pois.notes: Small dock in town center. Only small ships can dock; large ships tender.

pois.name: LeConte Glacier
pois.notes: Southernmost tidewater glacier in North America. Boat tour from Petersburg.

pois.name: Clausen Memorial Museum
pois.notes: Norwegian heritage, Tlingit culture, and fishing industry history.

pois.name: Hammer Slough
pois.notes: Iconic colorful stilt houses over tidal slough. Most photographed scene in town.

pois.name: Sons of Norway Hall
pois.notes: Norwegian cultural center. Rosemaling (decorative painting) throughout town.

pois.name: Sandy Beach Park
pois.notes: Tidal beach with views of the Wrangell Narrows and surrounding mountains.

pois.name: Raven Trail
pois.notes: 4-mile hike with panoramic views of Frederick Sound and surrounding islands.

pois.name: Petersburg Harbor
pois.notes: One of Alaska most productive fishing harbors. Norwegian heritage fishing fleet.

pois.name: Mitkof Island
pois.notes: Island home to Petersburg. Crystal Lake, Blind River Rapids, and muskeg meadows.

pois.name: Blind Slough Recreation Area
pois.notes: Swan observatory and salmon viewing platform. Short drive from town.
